raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The SCAQMD rejected a government mandate requiring the replacement of gas furnaces and heaters with electric units in four counties.",
    "The rejection of the mandate is considered a significant victory for residents in Senate District 36 and all Southern California.",
    "The proposed mandate would have resulted in families paying two to three times more for electricity compared to gas.",
    "The transition to all-electric units could strain the aging power grid during peak hours, potentially leading to rolling blackouts.",
    "The amended Rules 1111 and 1121 would have forced residents and small business owners to replace natural gas appliances by 2026.",
    "The cost to upgrade to all-electric space and water heaters can range from $1,500 to $47,000 per household."
  ]
}
```
